translations.bn: রাসূলুল্লাহ (সাল্লাল্লাহু আলাইহি ওয়া আলিহি ওয়া সাল্লাম) বলেছেন:
translations.de: Der Gesandte Gottes (Gottes Segen und Friede seien auf ihm und seiner Familie) sagte:
translations.en: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him and his family) said:
translations.es: El Mensajero de Dios (que la paz y las bendiciones de Dios sean con él y su familia) dijo:
translations.fa: رسول خدا صلی الله علیه وآله فرمود:
translations.fr: Le Messager de Dieu (que la paix et les bénédictions de Dieu soient sur lui et sa famille) a dit :
translations.id: Rasulullah (shallallahu 'alaihi wa alihi wa sallam) bersabda:
translations.ru: Посланник Аллаха (да благословит Аллах его и его род) сказал:
translations.tr: Resulullah (sallallahu aleyhi ve alihi ve sellem) buyurdu:
translations.ur: رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم نے فرمایا:
translations.zh: 安拉的使者（愿真主赐福他及其家族）说：

translations.bn: পানি পবিত্রকারী এবং (অন্য কিছু দ্বারা) পবিত্র করা হয় না।
translations.de: Das Wasser reinigt und wird (selbst) nicht gereinigt (durch etwas anderes).
translations.en: Water purifies and is not (itself) purified (by anything else).
translations.es: El agua purifica y no es (ella misma) purificada (por otra cosa).
translations.fa: آب پاک‌کننده است و (خود به چیز دیگری) پاک نمی‌شود.
translations.fr: L'eau purifie et n'est pas (elle-même) purifiée (par autre chose).
translations.id: Air menyucikan dan tidak (perlu) disucikan (oleh sesuatu yang lain).
translations.ru: Вода очищает и (сама) не очищается (чем-либо другим).
translations.tr: Su temizleyicidir ve (başka bir şeyle) temizlenmez.
translations.ur: پانی پاک کرنے والا ہے اور وہ خود پاک نہیں کیا جاتا (کسی اور چیز سے)۔
translations.zh: 水能净化，而水（本身）不需要被（其他东西）净化。

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الْكُلَيْنِيُّ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ حَدَّثَنِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ الْمَاءُ يُطَهِّرُ وَلَا يُطَهَّرُ

narrators.known_identity: Abu Ja'far Muhammad ibn Ya'qub al-Kulayni (d. 329 AH), the compiler of al-Kafi
narrators.name_ar: أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الْكُلَيْنِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Abu Ja'far Muhammad ibn Ya'qub al-Kulayni

narrators.known_identity: Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim al-Qummi (d. ~329 AH), a major Shia jurist and exegete, author of Tafsir al-Qummi, and one of al-Kulayni's primary teachers

narrators.ambiguity_note: Refers to Ibrahim ibn Hashim al-Qummi, the father of Ali ibn Ibrahim. Identification is based on the preceding narrator in the chain.
narrators.known_identity: Ibrahim ibn Hashim al-Qummi (d. ~early 3rd century AH), one of the most prolific narrators in Shia hadith, considered reliable (thiqah) by most scholars

narrators.ambiguity_note: Most likely al-Husayn ibn Yazid al-Nawfali. He commonly narrates from al-Sakuni in this chain pattern through Ibrahim ibn Hashim.
narrators.known_identity: Al-Husayn ibn Yazid al-Nawfali, a narrator known for transmitting from al-Sakuni

narrators.ambiguity_note: Most likely Isma'il ibn Abi Ziyad al-Sakuni (also known as al-Shalqani). He is a well-known narrator from Imam al-Sadiq (AS) and often appears paired with al-Nawfali in this chain.
narrators.known_identity: Isma'il ibn Abi Ziyad al-Sakuni, a narrator from Imam al-Sadiq (AS)
Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (AS), the sixth Imam (d. 148 AH)

bn.الماء: পানি — ইসলামি আইনে তাহারাতের (পবিত্রতার) প্রাথমিক মাধ্যম
bn.يطهَّر: পবিত্র করা হয় — পানি নিজে অন্য কোনো পদার্থ দ্বারা পবিত্র হওয়ার দরকার নেই
bn.يطهّر: পবিত্র করে — পানি অন্য জিনিসকে পবিত্র করে

de.الماء: Das Wasser — primäres Mittel der rituellen Reinigung (Tahara) im islamischen Recht
de.يطهَّر: Wird gereinigt — Wasser muss nicht durch eine andere Substanz gereinigt werden

en.الماء: Water (al-ma') -- the primary means of ritual purification (taharah) in Islamic law
en.يطهَّر: Is purified (yutahharu) -- passive form, meaning water itself does not need to be purified by something else
en.يطهّر: Purifies (yutahhiru) -- Form II verb from t-h-r, meaning to cleanse or make ritually pure

es.الماء: El agua — medio principal de purificación ritual (taharah) en la ley islámica
es.يطهَّر: Es purificada — el agua no necesita ser purificada por otra sustancia
es.يطهّر: Purifica — el agua limpia y purifica otras cosas

fa.الماء: آب — وسیله اصلی طهارت شرعی در فقه اسلامی
fa.يطهَّر: پاک شود — آب خود نیازی به تطهیر از سوی ماده دیگر ندارد
fa.يطهّر: پاک می‌کند — آب چیزهای دیگر را پاک می‌کند

fr.الماء: L'eau — moyen principal de purification rituelle (tahara) en droit islamique
fr.يطهَّر: Est purifiée — l'eau n'a pas besoin d'être purifiée par une autre substance
fr.يطهّر: Purifie — l'eau nettoie et purifie les autres choses

id.الماء: Air — sarana utama bersuci (thaharah) dalam hukum Islam
id.يطهَّر: Disucikan — air tidak perlu disucikan oleh zat lain
id.يطهّر: Menyucikan — air membersihkan dan menyucikan benda lain

ru.الماء: Вода — основное средство ритуального очищения (тахара) в исламском праве
ru.يطهَّر: Очищается — вода не нуждается в очищении другим веществом

tr.الماء: Su — İslam hukukunda taharetin temel aracı
tr.يطهَّر: Temizlenmez — suyun kendisinin başka bir maddece temizlenmesine ihtiyacı olmadığını ifade eder
tr.يطهّر: Temizler — suyu başka şeyleri temizleyen ajan olarak tanımlar

ur.الماء: پانی — اسلامی شریعت میں طہارت کا بنیادی ذریعہ
ur.يطهَّر: پاک کیا جاتا ہے — یعنی پانی خود کسی اور چیز سے پاک ہونے کا محتاج نہیں
ur.يطهّر: پاک کرتا ہے — یعنی پانی دوسری چیزوں کو پاک کرتا ہے

zh.الماء: 水——伊斯兰教法中仪式洁净（塔哈拉）的主要方式
zh.يطهَّر: 被净化——水本身不需要被其他物质净化
zh.يطهّر: 净化——水能清洁和净化其他事物

seo_questions.bn: ইসলামে পানির পবিত্রকারী প্রকৃতি সম্পর্কে নবী মুহাম্মদ কী বলেছেন?
seo_questions.de: Was sagte der Prophet Muhammad über die reinigende Eigenschaft des Wassers im Islam?
seo_questions.en: What did the Prophet Muhammad say about the purifying nature of water in Islam?
seo_questions.es: ¿Qué dijo el Profeta Muhammad sobre la naturaleza purificadora del agua en el Islam?
seo_questions.fa: پیامبر اکرم درباره خاصیت پاک‌کنندگی آب چه فرمودند؟
seo_questions.fr: Qu'a dit le Prophète Muhammad sur la nature purificatrice de l'eau en Islam ?
seo_questions.id: Apa sabda Nabi Muhammad tentang sifat penyuci air dalam Islam?
seo_questions.ru: Что сказал Пророк Мухаммад об очищающей природе воды в Исламе?
seo_questions.tr: Hz. Peygamber suyun temizleyici doğası hakkında ne buyurmuştur?
seo_questions.ur: اسلام میں پانی کی طہارت کے بارے میں رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم نے کیا فرمایا؟
seo_questions.zh: 先知穆罕默德在伊斯兰教中关于水的净化性质说了什么？

summaries.bn: নবী (সা.) তাহারাত সম্পর্কিত ইসলামি আইনের একটি মৌলিক নীতি প্রতিষ্ঠা করেছেন: পানি হলো প্রাথমিক পবিত্রকারী উপাদান এবং এটি নিজে অন্য কোনো পদার্থ দ্বারা পবিত্র হওয়ার প্রয়োজন নেই।
summaries.de: Der Prophet (SAWW) legte ein grundlegendes Prinzip der islamischen Rechtsprechung zur rituellen Reinheit fest: Wasser ist das primäre Reinigungsmittel und bedarf selbst keiner Reinigung durch eine andere Substanz.
summaries.en: The Prophet (SAWW) established a fundamental principle of Islamic jurisprudence regarding ritual purity: water is the primary purifying agent and does not itself require purification by another substance.
summaries.es: El Profeta (SAWW) estableció un principio fundamental de la jurisprudencia islámica sobre la pureza ritual: el agua es el agente purificador principal y no necesita ser purificada por otra sustancia.
summaries.fa: پیامبر اکرم (ص) اصل بنیادین فقهی درباره طهارت را بیان فرمودند: آب عامل اصلی تطهیر است و خود نیازی به پاک شدن توسط ماده دیگری ندارد.
summaries.fr: Le Prophète (SAWW) a établi un principe fondamental de la jurisprudence islamique sur la pureté rituelle : l'eau est l'agent purificateur principal et n'a pas besoin d'être purifiée par une autre substance.
summaries.id: Nabi (saww) menetapkan prinsip dasar fiqih Islam tentang thaharah: air adalah agen penyuci utama dan tidak perlu disucikan oleh zat lain.
summaries.ru: Пророк (САВВС) установил основополагающий принцип исламского правоведения о ритуальной чистоте: вода является основным очищающим средством и не нуждается в очищении другим веществом.
summaries.tr: Hz. Peygamber (s.a.v.s.) taharetle ilgili temel bir fıkhi kural koymuştur: Su, asıl temizleyicidir ve kendisinin başka bir madde ile temizlenmesine gerek yoktur.
summaries.ur: نبی اکرم صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم نے طہارت کے بارے میں ایک بنیادی فقہی اصول بیان فرمایا: پانی اصل پاک کرنے والا ہے اور خود کسی اور چیز سے پاک ہونے کا محتاج نہیں۔
summaries.zh: 先知（愿主赐福之）确立了伊斯兰教法中关于仪式洁净的一个基本原则：水是主要的净化剂，其本身不需要被其他物质净化。

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/3)

parts.text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الْكُلَيْنِيُّ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ حَدَّثَنِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ هَاشِمٍ

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الْمَاءُ يُطَهِّرُ وَ لَا يُطَهَّرُ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ja’far Muhammad Bin Yaqoub Al Kulayni, may Allahazwj have Mercy on him, said, ‘It was narrated to me by Ali Bin Ibrahim Bin Hashim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny, from
Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> says that Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The water cleans and cannot (itself) be cleaned (by something else)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Abu Ja‘far, Muhammad ibn Ya’qub al-Kulayni (rh) has said that narrated to me Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim from his father from al- Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy, who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, Ja‘far ibn Muhammad, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, has said, that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Water cleanses but it is not cleanable.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/5)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْمَاءُ كُلُّهُ طَاهِرٌ حَتَّى يُعْلَمَ أَنَّهُ قَذِرٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, and someone else from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Al Hassan Bin Al Husayn Al Lulu’ie, by his chain, said,
Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The water, all of it is (to be considered as) clean, until one knows that it is dirty’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya and others have narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from al-Hassan ibn al-Hassan al-Lu’lu’i through his chain of narrators has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘All water is clean until it is found out that it is not clean.”’

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/6)
text: الْمَاءُ كُلُّهُ طَاهِرٌ حَتَّى يُعْلَمَ أَنَّهُ قَذِرٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Abu Dawood Al Munshid, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad, from Yunus, from Hammad Bin Usman,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The water, all of it is (to be considered as) clean, until one knows that it is dirty’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Hassan from abu Dawud al-Munshid from Ja’far ibn Muhammad from Yunus from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, that all water (from source) is clean until it is found out that it is not clean.”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/6)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ مَاءِ الْبَحْرِ أَ طَهُورٌ هُوَ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus Bin Abdul Rahman, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the sea water, ‘Is it clean?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ’Isa from Yunus ibn ’Abd al-Rahman from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Is sea water clean?’ He (the Imam) replied, ‘Yes, it is clean.’”

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/6)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ مَاءِ الْبَحْرِ أَ طَهُورٌ هُوَ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Usman Bin Isa, from Abu Bak Al Hazramy who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the sea water, ‘Is it clean?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ’Isa from ‘Uthman ibn ’Isa from abu Bakr al-Hadramiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Is sea water clean?’ He (the Imam) replied, ‘Yes, it is clean.’”
